requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs Americas J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与美洲J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與美洲J1772 / CCS1

summary.en: Guatemala has no official, publicly confirmed EV connector mandate identified in the official sources reviewed. Because Guatemala uses an Americas-style 120/240 V, 60 Hz electrical environment and imports vehicles from the Americas and Asia, project specifications commonly need to be checked for SAE J1772 (IEC 62196 Type 1) AC and CCS Combo 1 (IEC 62196-3 configuration EE) DC compatibility, while legacy CHAdeMO or other connectors may appear for specific vehicle fleets. Exporters should confirm the required coupler with CNEE, the distributor, the charge-point operator, and the tender documents instead of assuming European Type 2 / CCS2 or China GB/T.
summary.zh: 在已审阅的官方来源中，未识别到危地马拉已公开确认的电动汽车接口强制规定。由于危地马拉采用美洲式120/240 V、60 Hz电气环境，且车辆来自美洲和亚洲等进口渠道，项目规范通常需要核查是否要求SAE J1772（IEC 62196 Type 1）交流和CCS Combo 1（IEC 62196-3 EE配置）直流兼容；特定车队也可能出现旧式CHAdeMO或其他接口。出口商应向CNEE、配电商、充电点运营商和招标文件确认所需耦合器，而不应假定采用欧洲Type 2 / CCS2或中国GB/T。
summary.zht: 在已審閱的官方來源中，未識別到瓜地馬拉已公開確認的電動汽車接口強制規定。由於瓜地馬拉採用美洲式120/240 V、60 Hz電氣環境，且車輛來自美洲和亞洲等進口渠道，項目規範通常需要核查是否要求SAE J1772（IEC 62196 Type 1）交流和CCS Combo 1（IEC 62196-3 EE配置）直流兼容；特定車隊也可能出現舊式CHAdeMO或其他接口。出口商應向CNEE、配電商、充電點運營商和招標文件確認所需耦合器，而不應假定採用歐洲Type 2 / CCS2或中國GB/T。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Type 1 / Type 2 AC coupler configurations
IEC 62196-3 — DC coupler configurations including EE (CCS Combo 1) and BB (China GB/T-related configuration)
IEC 61851-23 and IEC 61851-24 — DC charging station and digital communication requirements
Project-specific CNEE, distributor, charge-point-operator, or tender connector requirements

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. GB/T AC and DC connector hardware is physically and electrically different from SAE J1772 / IEC Type 1 and CCS Combo 1. The DC communication stack is also different: China GB/T 27930 uses CAN, while CCS1 deployments use IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118-related PLC communication where specified.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并使用GB/T 27930通信。GB/T交流和直流接口硬件与SAE J1772 / IEC Type 1及CCS Combo 1在物理和电气层面不同。直流通信栈也不同：中国GB/T 27930采用CAN，而CCS1部署在要求时使用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118相关PLC通信。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並使用GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T交流和直流接口硬體與SAE J1772 / IEC Type 1及CCS Combo 1在物理和電氣層面不同。直流通訊棧也不同：中國GB/T 27930採用CAN，而CCS1部署在要求時使用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118相關PLC通訊。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger should be treated as connector-incompatible for Guatemala projects unless the tender expressly accepts GB/T vehicles and couplers. Conversion to the likely Americas connector set requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot implementation, DC communication stack, labels, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Confirm with CNEE and the project owner whether the site requires J1772 AC, CCS1 DC, CHAdeMO, NACS, or a fleet-specific connector before quoting.
gap.zh: 除非招标文件明确接受GB/T车辆和耦合器，仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩应视为不适用于危地马拉项目。转换至可能采用的美洲接口组合，需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引实现、直流通信栈、标签、温升证据及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。报价前应向CNEE和项目业主确认站点要求J1772交流、CCS1直流、CHAdeMO、NACS或车队专用接口。
gap.zht: 除非招標文件明確接受GB/T車輛和耦合器，僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁應視為不適用於瓜地馬拉項目。轉換至可能採用的美洲接口組合，需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引實現、直流通訊棧、標籤、溫升證據及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。報價前應向CNEE和項目業主確認站點要求J1772交流、CCS1直流、CHAdeMO、NACS或車隊專用接口。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — exact Guatemala connector mandate could not be confirmed from official public sources; J1772 / CCS1 is the likely Americas-region baseline but must be confirmed with CNEE, distributor, CPO, vehicle fleet, and tender documents
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not a J1772 / CCS1 substitute; physical incompatibility requires hardware redesign

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not ship GB/T connector chargers to Guatemala as a plug-compatible solution. Treat J1772 / CCS1 as the likely Americas-region baseline, but confirm the required connector with CNEE and the project documents before hardware, labels, or test reports are finalized.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将GB/T接口充电桩作为可直接插接的方案出口至危地马拉。可将J1772 / CCS1视为美洲区域的可能基线，但在确定硬件、标签或测试报告前，必须向CNEE及项目文件确认所需接口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將GB/T接口充電樁作為可直接插接的方案出口至瓜地馬拉。可將J1772 / CCS1視為美洲區域的可能基線，但在確定硬體、標籤或測試報告前，必須向CNEE及項目文件確認所需接口。
